hero.subheadline: Professional maintenance, health monitoring, and security auditing for Pardus and Debian-based Linux distributions.

features.title: Everything your system needs
features.subtitle: Six integrated modules working together to keep your Linux system clean, fast, and secure.

items.cleaner_desc: Deep-clean APT cache, old logs, browser caches, and coredumps. Reclaim disk space safely with whitelist-based deletion.
items.health_desc: Monitor CPU, RAM, and disk usage with a composite 0–100 health score. Know your system’s condition at a glance.
items.security_desc: Detect SUID binaries, world-writable files, and SSH misconfigurations. Harden your system with actionable insights.
items.ai_desc: Hybrid intelligence: always-offline local analysis with optional cloud AI integration via Gemini, OpenAI, or Claude.
items.disk_desc: Discover large files and visualize space breakdown. Understand exactly where your storage is going.
items.auto_desc: Scheduled cleanup based on idle time, disk thresholds, and power state. Set it and forget it.

architecture.title: Built for Reliability
architecture.subtitle: A modular engine designed for performance, transparency, and deep system integration.

security.title: Security by Design
security.subtitle: We follow the principle of least privilege. Your system remains under your control, always.

items.whitelist_desc: Only pre-defined safe directories can be cleaned. Nothing outside the whitelist is ever touched.
items.polkit_desc: System-level operations require explicit user authentication via pkexec before execution.
items.norf_desc: Recursive force deletion is never used under any condition. Every file removal is deliberate.
items.root_desc: Critical directories like /, /home, and /etc are hardcoded as untouchable. No exceptions.
items.audit_desc: Every deletion is logged with timestamp and result. Complete transparency on all operations.
items.suid_desc: Known safe SUID files are filtered via KNOWN_SUID_PATHS. Only unexpected ones are flagged.
items.ssh_desc: PermitRootLogin, PasswordAuthentication, and more are verified against security best practices.

install.title: Ready to get started?
install.subtitle: GK Healter is available for major distributions. Choose your preferred installation method below.

footer.tagline: Professional system maintenance and security auditing for Linux.

terminal.title: Live Terminal Demo
terminal.subtitle: Experience the power of GK Healter directly in your browser. Select a command to see it in action.
